AWS Secret Key|negative|aws_secret=too-short
Generic API Key|positive|api_key = "MYCO_1234567890ABCDEFGHIJ"
Generic API Key|positive|apikey: service-token-value-1234567890
Generic API Key|negative|api_key = "short"
Generic Secret|positive|password = hunter2hunter2
Generic Secret|positive|secret: "plain-text-secret"
Generic Secret|negative|username = normal-user
Private RSA Key|positive|-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
Private RSA Key|positive|-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
Private RSA Key|negative|-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
JWT|positive|eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.payloadvalue12345.
JWT|positive|eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.anotherpayload99.
JWT|negative|jwt.token.example
Database URL|positive|postgres://user:password@example.com/db
Database URL|positive|mongodb://root:secret@localhost/admin
Database URL|negative|postgres://example.com/db
Slack Token|positive|xoxb-1234567890-abcdefghijklmnop
Slack Token|positive|xoxa-ABCDEFGHIJ-123456789012345678
Slack Token|negative|slack-token-placeholder
GitHub Token|positive|ghp_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890ABCD
GitHub Token|positive|gho_ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ1234567890_abcd

Generic Bearer Token|positive|Bearer abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456
Generic Bearer Token|positive|bearer ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ123456
Generic Bearer Token|negative|Bearer short
